ProjectSpecification.Summary: A modern recruitment platform dashboard for HR managers to manage candidate pipelines and parse resumes using AI technology.

UserRole.Name: HR Manager
UserRole.Description: Responsible for managing candidate pipelines, uploading resumes, and viewing statistical overviews.

UserRole.Name: Admin
UserRole.Description: Responsible for configuring the platform, managing user roles, and maintaining system integrity.

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Candidate Pipeline Management
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Allow HR managers to manage candidate pipelines using a Kanban board with columns for 'Applied', 'Interviewing', and 'Hired'.

Features.Feature: Drag-and-drop functionality to move candidates between columns
Real-time updates to reflect changes in candidate status

FunctionalRequirement.Name: AI Resume Parser
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Allow HR managers to upload resumes and automatically populate candidate profile cards with skills, experience, and education.

Features.Feature: Automatic population of candidate profile cards

FunctionalRequirement.Name: Statistical Overview
FunctionalRequirement.Description: Display a statistical overview section at the top of the dashboard showing total applications and hiring rates.

Features.Feature: Real-time updates to reflect changes in application and hiring data
Visual representation of data using charts or graphs

Component.Name: Statistical Overview Section
Component.Description: Displays total applications and hiring rates.

Component.Name: Candidate Pipeline Kanban Board
Component.Description: Allows HR managers to manage candidate pipelines.

Component.Name: Resume Upload Section
Component.Description: Allows HR managers to upload resumes and parse candidate data.

Component.Name: Sidebar Navigation Menu
Component.Description: Provides navigation to different sections of the platform.

Component.Name: Candidate Profile Card
Component.Description: Displays candidate skills, experience, and education.

Attribute.Name: CandidateID
Attribute.Description: Foreign key referencing the Candidates entity.

Attribute.Name: CandidateID
Attribute.Description: Foreign key referencing the Candidates entity.
